title: Breakfast for Dinner Sheet Pan Bake
description: A fun and easy sheet pan breakfast bake, perfect for a weeknight family meal. It's packed with savory sausage, fluffy eggs, and cheesy goodness that even the pickiest eaters will love.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Lightly grease a large sheet pan with cooking spray.
In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, salt, and pepper until well combined.
In a skillet, cook the breakfast sausage over medium heat, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned and cooked through. Drain any excess grease.
Dice the bell pepper and onion into small pieces.
Spread the cooked sausage, diced bell pepper, and onion evenly over the prepared sheet pan.
Pour the egg mixture over the sausage and vegetables on the sheet pan.
Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese evenly over the egg mixture.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the cheese is bubbly and lightly golden.
Let cool slightly before slicing and serving.
tips: For extra veggies, add spinach or mushrooms to the sheet pan along with the bell pepper and onion.
Serve with a side of toast or fresh fruit for a complete meal.
Leftovers can be stored in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days and reheated in the microwave.
